# Sprint Goal

Create a validated first sprint plan from `spec.md` that delivers the smallest meaningful slice of user value while preserving clear traceability from specification to backlog to sprint selection.

## In scope
- Select goal-aligned backlog items that enable a first meaningful increment.
- Make dependencies, blockers, and planning risks visible.
- Keep the sprint small enough to be credible in either solo or team mode.

## Non-goals
- Do not attempt to cover the full scope of `spec.md` in one sprint.
- Do not include work that is attractive but not goal-aligned.
- Do not overload the sprint just because capacity exists on paper.

## Success indicators
- Selected items clearly support the sprint goal.
- Deferred items have explicit reasons.
- The final sprint backlog is small, coherent, and reviewable.
